personality_one_liner: A cinematic, cosmic puzzle journey where premium glass interfaces float above the deep obsidian void of space.

spacing.rule: Use generous padding. Let the void (negative space) act as the primary framing device. Content should feel like it floats gracefully.

do's: Use heavy glass blur for the bottom sheets, settings modals, and sticky top headers.
Overlay home screen main menu cards with glassmorphism against the cosmic background.
Ensure text on glass uses onSurface and the glass has a tinted base of at least 75% opacity to guarantee readability.
dont's: Do not blur the puzzle grid itself or the gameplay area.
Do not use glass on small UI chips or form inputs.

screens.name: Home
screens.purpose: A breathtaking cinematic entry point that immerses the player into the 'Dot Link' universe.

states.loading: A single glowing gold dot pulsing gently in the center of an obsidian screen.
states.error: Glassmorphic modal with a retry connection button.

screens.layout: Full-screen cosmic background image with a vertical gradient scrim (transparent to 80% surface at bottom). The title 'Dot Link' is large in Fraunces serif. Below it, a vertical stack of premium glassmorphic buttons (Play, Shop, Settings) placed in the lower third thumb zone.

screens.name: LevelMap
screens.purpose: A visually satisfying journey through the 5 difficulties (Lumina, Aurora, Zenith, Eclipse, Void).

states.error: Error loading map data, glass sheet with retry.

screens.layout: Vertically scrolling winding path map. Nodes are circular: completed are filled gold, current has a glowing pulse, locked are frosted glass. A sticky glass header at the top shows total stars, current coins, and a back button. A fixed glass button at the bottom right to quickly jump to the 'Shop'.

screens.name: Gameplay
screens.purpose: The core puzzle experience (hybrid Flow Free + One Line) focusing on touch precision and premium feedback.
screens.layout: Top bar (glass over void) with level number, pause button, and hints counter. Center: The puzzle grid with glowing colored dots and smooth line drawing (lines glow upon connection). Bottom area: A mocked reward video banner (glassmorphic container saying 'Watch Ad for +50 Coins') and a sticky primary CTA for 'Hint (25 coins)' or 'Undo'.

screens.name: Shop & Profile
screens.purpose: Monetization hub with beautifully packaged IAP bundles and player stats.
screens.layout: 2-column grid of Stripe IAP packages. Each card uses a brandTertiary tinted gradient with a coin icon. The top section acts as the Profile with stats (Total Levels Cleared, Perfect Connections) sitting on a frosted glass surface.

home_bg.alt: A mesmerizing abstract representation of a cosmic vortex swirling in the vastness of space

instructions_to_main_agent: Implement the 'Dot Link' core logic allowing users to connect same-colored dots and fill the entire grid to complete the hybrid puzzle.

BANNED COLOR WORKAROUND: Since all blue/purple colors are strictly banned, use the following hex colors for the puzzle dots: Emerald (#32A852), Coral (#FF7F50), Amber (#FFC107), Rose (#E91E63), and Mint (#98FF98). Do NOT use any blue, navy, indigo, or purple dots.

Persist user progress (stars, unlocked levels, coin balance) using AsyncStorage or mmkv. Structure levels into 5 tiers: Lumina (Beginner), Aurora (Easy), Zenith (Medium), Eclipse (Hard), Void (Impossible). Generate level data programmatically if 50-100 levels per tier is too large to hardcode.
Implement premium haptics via expo-haptics on dot connection, level win, and button presses.
Mock the Stripe IAP and Reward Video ad UI using elegant glassmorphic components. When clicked, simulate a network request and grant coins.
Use react-native-reanimated for victory screens (confetti/particles when a level is completed) and smooth line drawing in the grid.
Include a settings modal (bottom sheet) for Sound, Music, and Haptics toggles. Integrate expo-av for basic sound effects (success chime, drawing hum) and a background ambient track.
Apply the mandatory vertical gradient scrim under text that sits on top of the background images.
